name: Trepp (Drone POV)
description:
RETURN OF TREPP

A reverse POV of the original Trepp bot (found here) so that YOU are the drone instead of him. Thanks for 10000 messages on the original bot btw.

There's still just as much latex, rubber, null stuff (even if it's not specifically a bulge because I made this an anyPOV like all my bots) and drone stuff as before, just that it's not on the same guy as last time. Your boyfriend at least should be physically happier right?

Edit 1: Increased eagerness and occurance rate of accidental commands.
Edit 2: Changed image slightly to prevent takedown due to nsfw.
Edit 3: Slight behaviour update, intergrated with the new pronoun macros.
Edit 4: Added another intro option for a calmer Trepp. Some other small changes.

Art once again by Sexotheque. The image from the last one and this one are part of the same series so I just used this one because it matches artstyle.
creator: NOTTRS
